videos.title: Phygital Retail is the Future! Key Insights from IFF Industry Leaders | Omnichannel Growth
videos.description:
The future of retail is Phygital — and brands that get it right are winning big.
At the India Fashion Forum’s “Going Phygital” panel, Rohit Khetan, Chief Marketing Officer at Ginesys, shares powerful insights on how fashion and retail brands can build seamless experiences across stores, apps, marketplaces, and social platforms.

Discover key takeaways on:
✔️ Unified inventory & real-time visibility
✔️ Creating a single customer view
✔️ Scaling omnichannel operations
✔️ Driving profitability in connected commerce
✔️ Overcoming real phygital transformation challenges

If you're in retail, fashion, D2C, or eCommerce, this is a must-watch insight into the future of omnichannel growth.

#IndiaFashionForum #IFF #PhygitalRetail #OmnichannelRetail #RetailTechnology #UnifiedCommerce #CustomerExperience #RetailGrowth

videos.title: Retail Trends: The Shift from Multichannel to Truly Omnichannel  #omnichannelretail  #retailtrends
videos.description:
Retail trends over the past decade have reshaped how brands operate. In this session, Rohit from Ginesys explains how the industry moved from parallel online and offline channels to deeply integrated omnichannel ecosystems. 

He shares why post-pandemic changes and D2C disruption make a single, pre-integrated platform essential—and how retailers unlock value once omnichannel use cases are fully aligned. #RetailTechnology #RetailInnovation

videos.title: Omnichannel in Action: From Vision to Real Retail Results | Ginesys
videos.description:
At IEF 2025, Rohit from Ginesys breaks down how Mufti, a Ginesys customer, turned its omnichannel strategy into measurable retail performance.
By implementing the Ginesys Omni platform, Mufti strengthened store-led fulfillment—enabling faster last-mile delivery, smarter in-store inventory utilization, and quicker customer turnaround. videos.title: From Legacy Retail to Cloud-Powered Growth: How Chandana Brothers Powers Retail with Ginesys
videos.description:
Discover how Chandana Brothers, a legacy textiles and jewellery retailer established in 1971, modernized its operations by moving from a legacy in-house system to Ginesys’ cloud-based ERP. In this testimonial, Mr. Allaka Gyaneshwar, Managing Director, shares why Chandana Brothers chose Ginesys after evaluating multiple ERP solutions—highlighting its cloud access, ease of use, and ability to efficiently manage day-to-day retail operations.
Ms. Apoorva Jayasimha, CFO, explains how moving from a legacy system to Ginesys resolved key challenges around scalability, GST compliance, inventory visibility, and statutory processes—turning the ERP shift into a true business transformation.
With strong implementation support and rapid issue resolution, Ginesys proved to be more than an ERP upgrade—it became a transformative platform powering scalable retail growth.

videos.title: GSTIN Verification in Ginesys POS| Demo & Walkthrough
videos.description:
In this video, we demonstrate how 𝐆𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐍 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐟𝐢����𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 works in 𝐆𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐲𝐬 𝐏𝐎𝐒 during customer creation at the billing counter.

𝐘𝐨𝐮’𝐥𝐥 𝐬𝐞𝐞 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐜𝐚𝐧:
- Verify a customer’s GSTIN instantly while billing
- View verified GST details directly in the POS
- Download the GSTIN verification response for reference
- Select the correct address when multiple addresses are registered under the same GSTIN
- Auto-populate verified 𝐧𝐚𝐦𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 into the customer master
- Reduce errors in 𝐈𝐑𝐍 𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 by ensuring accurate GSTIN and address data upfront

This feature helps speed up customer creation, improves data accuracy, and makes the invoicing and e-invoicing process more reliable—especially during peak billing hours.

videos.title: GSTIN Verification in ERP | Demo & Walkthrough
videos.description:
In this video, we walk you through the GSTIN Verification feature in Ginesys ERP (HO) and show how to configure and use it across master forms.

𝐘𝐨𝐮’𝐥𝐥 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨:
- Configure EaseMyGST (EMG) credentials in Enterprise Application Settings
- Verify GSTINs directly from ERP master forms
- View verified GST details side-by-side with existing master data
- Download the GSTIN verification response for reference
- Check Return Filing Status to assess vendor compliance
- Update master records with verified name and address details
- Track GST status and last verified date across the system

GSTIN verification helps improve data accuracy, ensures compliance, and reduces downstream issues in invoicing, e-invoicing, and reporting.


𝐖𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐞𝐞 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐆𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐍 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐏𝐎𝐒?

videos.description:

Discover the latest enhancements in the 𝐂𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐒𝐡𝐞𝐞𝐭 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐥𝐞 that make cost estimation more 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞, 𝐟𝐥𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭.

In this video, 𝐰𝐞’𝐥𝐥 𝐰𝐚𝐥𝐤 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝟓 𝐦𝐚𝐣𝐨𝐫 𝐮𝐩𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬:
 - Sub-assembly item support for accurate BOM planning
 - Flexibility to adjust component rates in real-time
 - Copy existing cost sheets for faster preparation
 - Modify cost sheets post approval without breaking workflow
 - Audit trail for complete transparency

Watch the step-by-step demo to see how these enhancements simplify cost sheet creation, copying, modification, and tracking — helping you save time and improve accuracy in production planning.

videos.title: EaseMyGST Enhancements Webinar: GSTR-6, IMS Reconciliation & Bulk Filing
videos.description:
In this exclusive 𝐆𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐲𝐬 𝐖𝐞𝐛𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐫, we explore the latest features and enhancements in 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐌𝐲𝐆𝐒𝐓, designed to streamline your GST compliance and boost operational accuracy.
Whether you're handling high-volume filings or tracking e-way bills, this session offers a detailed walkthrough of newly introduced modules and tools that make GST returns faster, easier, and more error-free.

🔍 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:
1️⃣𝐈𝐒𝐃 𝐆𝐒𝐓𝐑-𝟔 𝐅𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 – Simplified Input Service Distributor return management
2️⃣ 𝐈𝐌𝐒 𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 – Smart invoice matching for accurate compliance
3️⃣ 𝐆𝐒𝐓𝐑-𝟏 𝐁𝐮𝐥𝐤 𝐅𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 – Speed up returns with efficient bulk upload mode
4️⃣𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐄-𝐰𝐚𝐲 𝐁𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 – Get real-time visibility into transporter-side data

📌 Missed the live demo? No worries! Watch the full session now to stay ahead in your GST journey with 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐌𝐲𝐆𝐒𝐓 𝐛𝐲 𝐆𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐲𝐬.

videos.title: Zwing POS – A Unified Retail Experience Powered by Ginesys One
videos.description:
In today’s dynamic retail environment, growth demands more than just great merchandise — it requires operational clarity and system-wide integration.
𝐙𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐏𝐎𝐒, a powerful solution within the Ginesys One product suite, is designed to streamline and unify your retail operations. With great features like real-time inventory syncing with ERP and OMS, and offline billing, Zwing delivers for a modern hyper-connected retail environment.

𝐙𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐏𝐎𝐒 𝐛𝐲 𝐆𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐲𝐬 𝐎𝐧𝐞, 𝐚 𝐬𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐤, 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐏𝐎𝐒 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥.

videos.title: Define Job Rate Without Specifying The Jobber in The Process Master
videos.description:
This update allows you to set process rates without linking them to a specific jobber — supported in both UI and Excel import. Ideal for setups with high jobber turnover or fixed in-house rates. Simplify configuration, reduce effort, and streamline operations where jobber-specific rates aren't necessary.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐍𝐞𝐰?
You can now define process rates without assigning a jobber. This is especially helpful for:
 ✅ Organizations with high jobber turnover, where jobbers change frequently.
 ✅ In-house job work setups, where fixed rates are preferred across items or articles, regardless of the jobber.
 ✅ This simplifies configuration and helps streamline operations where specifying a jobber is not critical.

𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧: 𝟏𝟐.𝟐𝟕.𝟎
https://ginesysone.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PUB/pages/413368482/Release+Note+12.27.0

videos.title: Real Roadblock to Retail Tech? It's Not What You Think  #OmnichannelRetail
videos.description: At #PRC2025, Rohit from Ginesys unpacks the real challenges brands face in going omnichannel. It’s not just about ROI — it’s about integration. From fragmented systems to unclear fulfillment logic, retailers struggle not because they lack intent, but because their tools don’t talk. #RetailTech #OmnichannelChallenge #RetailTransformation #B2BInsights

videos.title: Mastering the New Item Master in Zwing Console | Ginesys One Webinar
videos.description:
In this informative session on the new and improved Item Master module within the Zwing Console, we explore the enhanced features designed to simplify and streamline product data management. From configuring the module to managing product categories and details, this session provides a complete walkthrough to help you optimize your operations.

𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:
1️⃣ 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐥𝐞 𝐑𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐦𝐩 𝐎𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐞𝐰
- Enhanced UI and user-friendly workflows
- Improved performance and navigation

2️⃣ 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫���� 𝐖𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡:
- Setting up Item Master configurations
- Creating and managing product categories
- Adding and maintaining product details with ease

3️⃣𝐋𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐦𝐨:
- Step-by-step demonstration of the new module

Whether you're onboarding new items or revamping your catalog, this session offers everything you need to efficiently manage your product data with the new Zwing Item Master.


𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐬:

videos.title: ISD Returns & IMS Reconciliation| Ginesys Webinar
videos.description:
In this insightful session on 𝐈𝐒𝐃 𝐑𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐬 & 𝐈𝐌𝐒 𝐑����𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧, we deep-dive into the essential processes for ensuring seamless Input Tax Credit (ITC) compliance. This webinar provided a comprehensive guide to filing ISD returns, reconciling GSTR-6A data, and using IMS reconciliation tools to avoid errors and mismatches. Whether you're managing tax operations or simply looking to stay GST-compliant, this session is packed with insights, real-world challenges, and actionable best practices.

𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:
1️⃣ ISD Returns – Rules & Benefits
2️⃣ GSTR-6 Filing & GSTR-6A Reconciliation
3️⃣ IMS Reconciliation Explained
4️⃣ ITC Best Practices

📌 If you missed the live session, this is your chance to catch up on everything you need to know for improving your GST processes.

videos.title: Introducing-Additional Flat Discount Promotion - Item Level (GPOS)
videos.description:
Exciting new feature alert! Ginesys POS now supports 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐅𝐥𝐚𝐭 𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐈𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐋𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐥, giving businesses more flexibility in applying multiple promotions.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐍𝐞𝐰?
  - Now, an 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 can be applied 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐨𝐩 𝐨𝐟 𝐚𝐧 𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐦-𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐥 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧.
  - Offers 𝐟𝐥𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐢𝐧 𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨-𝐛𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, allowing discounts to extend beyond the exact ratio.

𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝐑𝐞𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠:
  - Easily set up in 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐃𝐞𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 → 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐈𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨.
  - Reports at HO/POS and EMR integration are also updated.

introducing-additional flat discount promotion - item level (gpos) exciting new feature alert! ginesys pos now supports 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐅𝐥𝐚𝐭 𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐈𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐋𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐥, giving businesses more flexibility in applying multiple promotions.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐍𝐞𝐰?
  - now, an 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 can be applied 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐨𝐩 𝐨𝐟 𝐚𝐧 𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐦-𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐥 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧.
  - offers 𝐟𝐥𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐢𝐧 𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨-𝐛𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, allowing discounts to extend beyond the exact ratio.

𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝐑𝐞𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠:
  - easily set up in 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐃𝐞𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 → 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐈𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨.
  - reports at ho/pos and emr integration are also updated.

videos.title: Exploring Gift Voucher Features & Redemption with Zwing POS | Ginesys One Webinar
videos.description:
In this webinar session on 𝐆𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐕𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬 & 𝐑𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐙𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐏𝐎𝐒, we explore how businesses can enhance customer engagement and drive sales through seamless gift voucher management. This session provides a step-by-step walkthrough of creating, managing, and redeeming gift vouchers at Zwing POS. If you're looking to optimize your retail operations and boost revenue, this session is for you!


𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:
1️⃣ 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢���𝐧 𝐭𝐨 𝐆𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐕𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞
 - Understanding the benefits of gift vouchers for businesses
 - How gift vouchers can enhance customer retention and loyalty

2️⃣ 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐖𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡: 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐞 & 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞 𝐆𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐕𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐬
 - Step-by-step guide to generating and managing gift vouchers
 - Setting up expiration dates, denominations, and usage rules

3️⃣ 𝐆𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐕𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐬 & 𝐑𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐚𝐭 𝐙𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐏𝐎𝐒
 - Selling gift vouchers seamlessly through Zwing POS
 - Redeeming vouchers efficiently at checkout for a smooth customer experience

4️⃣ 𝐋𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐐&𝐀 𝐒𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧
 - Get your queries answered by experts in real-time

This session is packed with practical insights to help you leverage gift vouchers effectively and enhance your business operations.

videos.title: Understanding IMS Reconciliation & Counter Party E-Way Bill | Ginesys One Webinar
videos.description:
In this informative session on 𝐈𝐌𝐒 𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐲 𝐄-𝐖𝐚𝐲 𝐁𝐢𝐥𝐥, we explore how businesses can streamline their GST compliance by effectively managing IMS invoices and E-Way Bills. This session provides a structured approach to reconciling invoices, predicting incoming goods, and leveraging HSN-wise insights for better inventory management. If you're looking to optimize your operations and stay updated with GST best practices, this session is for you!


𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢��𝐡𝐭𝐬:
1️⃣ 𝕀𝕄𝕊 ℝ𝕖𝕔𝕠𝕟𝕔𝕚𝕝𝕚𝕒𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟:
 - Importance of IMS & how to download IMS data
 - Matching IMS invoices with purchase invoices for accuracy
 - Generating GSTR-2B through actionable insights

2️⃣ ℂ𝕠𝕦𝕟𝕥𝕖𝕣𝕡𝕒𝕣𝕥𝕪 𝔼-𝕎𝕒𝕪 𝔹𝕚𝕝𝕝 𝕄𝕒𝕟𝕒𝕘𝕖𝕞𝕖𝕟𝕥:
  - Predicting incoming goods & identifying transporters
  - Accessing vehicle details, transporter addresses & distances
  - Leveraging HSN-wise insights for better inventory management

videos.title: Mastering Modern Inventory: Unlocking Efficiency with Browntape | Webinar Highlights
videos.description:
In this comprehensive session on "𝐌𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐈𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲: 𝐁𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐩𝐞'𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬," we explore how Ginesys OMS(Browntape) software empowers businesses to achieve seamless inventory management. Learn about its advanced features, innovative solutions, and practical strategies to overcome key inventory challenges. If you’re looking to optimize operations and enhance efficiency, this session is tailored for you!

𝐀𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐚 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:

𝐄𝐟𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭: Strategies to centralize control and ensure real-time accuracy.
𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥-𝐓𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐒𝐲𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐧𝐠: Streamlining operations across multiple channels.
𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐭𝐨𝐜𝐤 𝐑𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭: Staying ahead of demand and avoiding stockouts.
𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢-𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭: Simplifying complex inventory operations.
𝐑𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐂𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: Efficiently managing post-sale processes.
𝐒𝐊𝐔 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 & 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭 𝐁𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠: Maximizing inventory potential.
𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐬 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐁𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐩𝐞: Real-world solutions to common issues.


This recorded session is packed with actionable insights and tools to help you master modern inventory management.

videos.title: Streamlining Retail Excellence: Dress Circle Shopping Mall's Journey with Ginesys
videos.description: Dress Circle Shopping Mall, a leading multi-brand retail shopping mall established in 1995, specializes in ready-made garments and sarees. Managing partner Mr. Harish Reddy shares how adopting Ginesys in 2019 resolved their reporting challenges and streamlined operations with seamless integration. He highlights the swift support from the support and customization teams, ensuring quick issue resolution. With user-friendly software tailored to retail needs, Ginesys has been a trusted partner in their journey for over five years.

videos.title: Introducing OTP Based Approval Mechanism for Manual Discounting in Ginesys POS
videos.description:
We’re thrilled to unveil a new feature designed to enhance security and streamline control over manual discounting: “𝐎𝐓𝐏-𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐥 𝐌𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐬𝐦 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐚𝐥 𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐧 𝐆𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐲𝐬 𝐏𝐎𝐒.”
With this feature enabled, applying a manual discount on a POS or GV bill sends an OTP to the designated approver. The approver reviews the request and, if approved, shares the OTP with the cashier to authorise the discount, ensuring a secure process.

𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐔𝐩𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐞:
- Centrally managed approvers and site-specific approvers assignments, controlled from the HO.
- Applicable to both POS Bills and Gift Voucher Bills.
- Supports manual discounting at both item and bill levels.
For a step-by-step guide, watch this release video!


📌 𝐃𝐨𝐧’𝐭 𝐌𝐢𝐬𝐬 𝐎𝐮𝐭: A detailed FAQ section is included in the release notes, addressing all potential queries. Be sure to review it for a complete understanding. 

𝐅𝐀𝐐: - https://ginesysone.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PUB/pages/201261111/FAQ+for+OTP-Based+Approval+Mechanism+for+Manual+Discounting+in+Ginesys+POS

𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧: 𝟏𝟐.𝟐𝟓.𝟎 | 𝟐.𝟐𝟓.𝟎 
𝐆𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐲𝐬 𝐄𝐑𝐏: -https://ginesysone.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PUB/pages/190185776/Release+Note+12.25.0

videos.title: IMS Reconciliation & Essential GSTR Updates: Prepare for 2025 Changes | EaseMyGST Webinar
videos.description:
In this detailed session on "𝐈𝐌𝐒 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐌𝐲𝐆𝐒𝐓," we showcase how EaseMyGST helps businesses streamline their processes with its Invoice Management System (IMS) and prepares them for critical upcoming changes in GST regulations. If you’re aiming to enhance your GST compliance and stay updated with the latest developments, this session is for you!

𝐀𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐚 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:
𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐨 𝐈𝐌𝐒 (𝙄𝙣𝙫𝙤𝙞𝙘𝙚 𝙈𝙖𝙣𝙖𝙜𝙚𝙢𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙎𝙮𝙨𝙩𝙚𝙢): A comprehensive overview of its features and benefits.
𝐈𝐌𝐒 𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Step-by-step guidance to streamline your GST compliance.
𝐔𝐩𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐆𝐒𝐓𝐑-𝟑𝐁: Latest changes and their implications.
𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐆𝐒𝐓𝐑-𝟏𝐀: Why it’s critical for compliance and its role in avoiding mismatches.
𝐁𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐟 𝐆𝐒𝐓𝐑-𝟑𝐁 (𝐄𝐟𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐉𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝟏, 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓): Insights into the new rules and how to prepare your business.

This recorded session is packed with actionable insights and updates to keep you ahead in GST compliance.


𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐬:
1. Ms. Kajol Sahu
Customer Success Executive | Ginesys One
2. Mr. Yogesh Sharma
Implementation Executive and GST Expert | Ginesys One


Host- Bikram Roy | Ginesys One

videos.title: Customer Microservice in Ginesys One & Its Role in Zwing Omni POS | Ginesys One Webinar
videos.description:
Catch up on the full session where we explored the Customer Microservice in Ginesys One. It is a central service to manage all retail customer data from Ginesys ERP, Ginesys POS, Zwing POS, and Ginesys OMS(Browntape)

This webinar covers everything from creating customer details capture forms to managing customer data and groups, enabling a seamless omnichannel retail experience.

𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐓𝐨𝐩𝐢𝐜𝐬 𝐂𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝:
𝐎𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐞𝐰 𝐨𝐟 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐌𝐢𝐜𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 – A breakdown of its core features and benefits.
𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐬 – Step-by-step guide to setting up customized customer forms.
𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐥𝐬 – How to integrate customer data across various sales channels.
𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 – Learn how to manage and organize customer data effectively.
𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐩𝐬 – Insights into customer segmentation for personalized marketing strategies.

customer microservice in ginesys one & its role in zwing omni pos | ginesys one webinar catch up on the full session where we explored the customer microservice in ginesys one. it is a central service to manage all retail customer data from ginesys erp, ginesys pos, zwing pos, and ginesys oms(browntape)

this webinar covers everything from creating customer details capture forms to managing customer data and groups, enabling a seamless omnichannel retail experience.

videos.title: From manual to modern: Camey Synthetics enhances business operations with Ginesys
videos.description: Mr. Hitesh Chawla, Owner of Camey Synthetics, shares how their 40-year-old apparel manufacturing business transformed with Ginesys ERP software. After using multiple software like Munimji, Busy, and Tally, they choose Ginesys to consolidate all operations into one platform. This move streamlined their B2B and B2C processes, improved reporting efficiency, and simplified production management. He also added how Ginesys helped Camey Synthetics enhance business efficiency and deliver better results.

videos.title: Transforming retail with Ginesys: Moradabad Fashion’s success story in inventory management
videos.description: Mr. Harsh Agarwal, Director of Moradabad Fashion (Shree Krishna Store), shares how they transformed their retail business by switching to Ginesys software in 2020. After struggling with inventory management and reporting using Marg software, Ginesys provided them with seamless operations, customized reports, and exceptional support. He also added how Shree Krishna Store leveraged Ginesys to enhance inventory control, improve customer experience, and continue growing in the competitive retail market.

videos.title: From tradition to technology: Swathi Silks’ success story with Ginesys software
videos.description: Mr. Vura Venkata Ramana Babu, owner of Swathi Silks & Readymades, shares how Ginesys software transformed their multi-brand retail business. With over 60 years in fashion retail and six branches across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, Swathi Silks adopted Ginesys in 2019, which helped them double their turnover and optimize inventory management. He also explains how Ginesys helped them stay ahead of fashion trends, streamline stock management, and improve vendor coordination. Mr. Babu highly recommends Ginesys for its excellent support and efficiency in solving retail challenges.

videos.title: Mastering Marketplace Event Readiness: Expert Strategies with Browntape | Ginesys One Webinar
videos.description:
Are you ready to take your marketplace selling strategy to the next level?

Check out an in-depth webinar on "Mastering Marketplace Event Readiness with Browntape," where we delve into essential strategies for dominating online sales events and beyond. This session is packed with expert insights and actionable tips on:

𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭 𝐋𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Learn how to craft compelling product listings that attract more customers and drive higher conversions.
𝐈𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐟𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐞𝐬: Discover how to efficiently manage your inventory and fulfillment processes to meet demand and avoid stockouts or delays.
𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚���𝐝 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: Get the scoop on setting competitive prices and running effective promotions to maximize your revenue during peak sales periods.
𝐀𝐝𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐬: Explore the best practices for advertising and marketing on major marketplaces, ensuring your products get the visibility they deserve.
𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐚-𝐃𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐃𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠: Understand how to leverage data analytics to make informed decisions that boost your sales and profitability.
𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐀𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐲𝐬𝐢𝐬: Gain insights into monitoring your competition and staying ahead in a crowded marketplace.
𝐒𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐲 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Optimize your supply chain to enhance efficiency and reduce costs, ensuring smooth operations during high-demand events.

𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐬:

videos.title: Introducing Audit Trail Feature In Ginesys POS
videos.description:
Welcome to our complete guide on the newly introduced Audit Trail feature in Ginesys POS! This video will take you through everything you need to know about how this Feature helps in tracking and recording all modifications made in Ginesys POS System.

𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬 𝐂𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝:
- 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐨 𝐏𝐎𝐒 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐭 𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐚 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭: See how the Audit Trail feature tracks and monitors every change made in your POS system.
- 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐭 𝐋𝐨𝐠𝐬: Easily compare different versions of POS bills to see what changes were made, ensuring accuracy.
- 𝐄𝐱𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐞𝐝 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐬: Learn how to export audit logs for a detailed record of all changes.
- 𝐂𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐆𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐲𝐬 𝐏𝐎𝐒 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐭 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐥: Understand the key principles of the Audit Trail feature to maintain data integrity and security in your POS system.
Please see the release video for detailed explanations.

𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧: 𝟏𝟐.𝟐𝟑.𝟎 | 𝟐.𝟐𝟑.𝟎 
Ginesys POS- https://ginesysone.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/GPOS/pages/114294842/Release+Note+2.23.0

- 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐨 𝐏𝐎𝐒 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐭 𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐚 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭: see how the audit trail feature tracks and monitors every change made in your pos system.

videos.title: Essential Updates from the 53rd GST Council Meeting & EaseMyGST New Features | EaseMyGST Webinar
videos.description:
In this insightful webinar on the "Key Updates from the 53rd GST Council Meeting & New Features on EaseMyGST," we cover the latest updates from the 53rd GST Council Meeting and showcase the exciting new features on the EaseMyGST platform. This session is essential for businesses and professionals keen to stay updated on GST compliance and leverage the latest tools for efficiency.

Agenda Highlights:
1. 53rd GST Council Meeting: Key takeaways and implications.
2. New Features on EaseMyGST: Discover the latest updates and enhancements.
3. Importance of GSTR 3B Marking: Why it matters and how to stay compliant.
4. EaseMyGST GST Assist Services: Introduction to our new support services designed to simplify your GST compliance.

Speakers-

GST Expert EaseMyGST Operations | Ginesys One

videos.title: From Small Shop to Retail Chain: Kashmiri Sons' Success with Ginesys
videos.description:
Mr. Ankur Goyal, Director of Kashmiri Sons, shares their journey from a small fabric shop in 1975 to a multi-brand retail chain. He discusses the challenges in managing stock and billing and how Ginesys ERP provided the robust solution they needed. Since adopting Ginesys in 2014, they've enjoyed seamless operations, efficient stock management, and smooth expansions across Uttarakhand.
He also discusses how Ginesys empowered them to manage multiple stores centrally, fostering the confidence and processes essential for their growth. Looking ahead, Mr. Goyal highlights their plans for omnichannel expansion with Ginesys One, ensuring future success in both online and offline retail.

videos.title: Expert Webinar Guide on Optimizing Payment Reconciliation for E-commerce Success
videos.description:
An in-depth webinar on Payment Reconciliation tailored specifically for e-commerce marketplaces and websites. Our expert speakers will guide you through the essentials of matching payment details as given by the marketplace with your own records. In this session, you will have a thorough understanding of payment reconciliation and be equipped with practical tools to make any claims to the marketplaces and channels. This is a must-watch for e-commerce professionals looking to streamline their financial processes and improve overall efficiency.

Webinar Agenda and Key Topics:
1. Introduction to Payment Reconciliation: Understand the basics and why it's crucial for your business.
2. Importance of Payment Reconciliation in E-commerce: Discover the impact on your bottom line and customer satisfaction.
3. Challenges in Payment Reconciliation: Learn about common obstacles and how to overcome them.
4. Configurations of Products, Orders & Payment Information: Get insights on setting up your systems for seamless reconciliation.
5. Identification and Organization of Reconciled and Unreconciled Orders: Techniques to streamline your workflow.
6. Configuring Rate Card Parameters: Ensure accurate billing and payments with proper rate card settings.
7. Reconciliation Reporting: Utilize reporting tools for better tracking and decision-making.
8. Benefits of using the Browntape Reconciliation Tool: See how our tool can simplify and enhance your reconciliation process.

Panelists and speakers:
Speakers-
1. Mr. Naved Khan
Head of Sales - Browntape Operations | Ginesys One
2. Ms. Siddhi Gaude
Senior CSM - Browntape Operations | Ginesys One

Ms. Ciona Sequeira
Assistant Manager Sales - Browntape Operations | Ginesys One


Host- Bikram Roy | Ginesys One

videos.title: Introducing POS Customer Master Fields Configuration
videos.description:
From now onwards brands can efficiently customize and manage the POS Customers UI fields in the POS screen at the time of billing as per their specific requirements and increase the overall efficiency of the billing process. 

With this enhancement, there are some important points to note:
 - Only Mobile number & ISD Code is hardcoded mandatory now.
 - This change not applicable for Zwing POS
 - This Configuration is a master configuration and will be applicable globally
 - This Change will be applicable in Normal POS, Delivery Slip & Collection Center.

videos.title: Ecommerce Marketplaces: Strategies for Sustainable Success | Ginesys One Webinar
videos.description:
This webinar delves into the topic of 'Ecommerce Marketplaces: Strategies for Sustainable Success', exploring key tactics to enhance your online presence, drive customer engagement, and optimize sales performance. Check out this insightful session where you'll dive deep into the crucial topics that can elevate your online business to new heights.

Agenda Highlights:
1. Understanding Marketplace Dynamics: Gain insights into the ever-changing landscape of ecommerce marketplaces and discover how to choose the right platforms for your business.
2. Effective Product Listings and Search Optimization: Learn the art of crafting compelling product listings and optimizing them for maximum visibility in search results.
3. Pricing Strategies for Success: Explore innovative pricing techniques that can set your products apart and drive sales.
4. Adaptation, Innovation & Market Trends: Stay ahead of the curve by understanding the latest market trends and leveraging adaptation and innovation to secure a competitive edge.
5. Data Analytics and Metrics Mastery: Uncover the power of data in shaping your marketplace strategy and discover the key metrics that drive success.
6. Brand Building and Reputation Management: Establish a strong brand presence and manage your reputation effectively to foster trust and loyalty among your customers.


Panelists and speakers:
Panelist-
Mr. Saeesh Barad
Account Manager for Managed Services | Ginesys One

Speakers-
1. Mr. Naved Khan
Sales Lead Browntape Operations | Ginesys One
2. Ms. Chelsea Furtado
Inside Sales Executive | Ginesys One


Host- Bikram Roy | Ginesys One

videos.title: Ginesys One Concept - Revolutionizing Retail Management for Online and Offline Retail
videos.description:
Welcome to the future of retail management with the Ginesys One Concept! Dive deep into the groundbreaking features and functionalities of Ginesys One, the next-generation solution that is transforming the way retailers operate. Ginesys One, is India's leading omni-retail suite designed to revolutionize retail management. The retail stack seamlessly integrates various aspects of retail operations, including point of sale (POS), Retail ERP, Ecommerce OMS, Warehousing, Accounting,  Production, BI, GST and more into a single, unified platform. 
Ginesys One empowers retailers to streamline their operations, boost efficiency, and provide exceptional customer experiences like never before.

- Introduction of Transporter Id in Ginesys
- Bifurcation of User security for POS E-invoice
- Allow GRT revert from HO on IRN cancellation from POS

videos.title: Ginesys ERP and POS is the backbone of Ethnicity & Style Union
videos.description:
Nexon Omniverse Ltd has two formats - Ethnicity (a MBO store format) & Style Union (a value fashion brand).  Both formats have been successful from the early stage and combined command a presence of 80+ stores. Using Ginesys ERP and POS from day one has been a very good investment for the brands, and they have excelled in their segment.

Mr. Alok Dharadhar, Head of Planning & Process, describes his experience with Ginesys ERP, POS software and how it has exceeded his expectations in handling the sales volume of the business.
Mr. Sankat Mochan, Head of Supply Chain Planning and Operations explains how Ginesys' deep integration with other applications helps to reduce their time as well as manpower and maximize their productivity and sales. He also applauded Ginesys' development and product team. 
Mr. Abhishek Jain, Chief Financial Officer at Nexon Omniverse Ltd. talked about how Ginesys' end-to-end retail solution with integrated accounting is helping for business reviews, budgeting, variance analysis, etc.

videos.title: Feature Update - Enhancement in replenishment source tagging system
videos.description:
This video explains the enhancements incorporated in “Replenishment Source Tagging” for a POS Site. After this update, tagging of replenishment sites is separated from POS Site master and a new role-based app operation is introduced for the same allowing users to segregate access to POS Site master and Replenishment Sources. Also, a new checkbox is introduced in replenishment sources via which users could designate HO sites for POS Order fulfillment.

Release version: 12.16.0 | 2.16.0 
Release note link: https://ginesys.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PUB/pages/4090298401/Release+notes+12.16.0

Release version: 12.16.0 | 2.16.0

videos.title: Feature Update - Auto calculating TDS Reversal amount
videos.description:
This video explains the change in calculation of TDS reversal amount in TDS reversal journal.
Currently the user needs to input the TDS reversal amount in the transaction and the system auto-populates the taxable/applicable amount. This behaviour in certain cases leads to a mismatch between actual Debit Note amount and TDS taxable/applicable amount.
So after this update, the amount mismatch will get resolved as users can now simply input the Debit note amount as taxable/applicable amount for TDS reversal.

Release version: 12.14.1 
Release note link: https://ginesys.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PUB/pages/3986948266/Release+Note+12.14.1

videos.description:

After this update, the organisation can enable the configuration at the company level to ensure that a maker of a document can not authorise/release/post the document. Before this there was no system control for this aspect and control needs to be handled manually via internal SOP.

videos.title: PRASHANT LOHIA, CEO AND FOUNDER OF GINESYS SPEAK ABOUT RETAIL ERP ON ZEE BUSINESS.
videos.description:
On 23rd March, 2014 ZEE BUSINESS covered Ginesys about its services in retail sector. Prashant Lohia, CEO and Founder of Ginesys stated that ERP is a suite of integrated software applications that benefits retailers in multiple aspects. It is an integrated system that operates in real time. He further highlights numerous benefits of ERP.

Ginesys provides end-to-end enterprise application solutions for the entire retail value chain; from production to retail.
